name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans at 3002 Capitol Ave unit B, Sacramento, CA 95816 in the East Sacramento neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.7 stars across 16 reviews. Call +1 916-848-5948.
description_long: Swift Title Loans operates a physical location at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee, serving customers seeking emergency cash through secured lending. The company positions itself as accessible to borrowers with poor credit histories, explicitly welcoming those with past bankruptcies and credit challenges. Their service model centers on car title loans—a form of secured lending where borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral in exchange for rapid cash access. The company advertises a competitive advantage through same-day funding for applicants who sign up by noon, positioning themselves in the emergency-cash market segment. Their loan amounts range from $100 to $2,000 for standard title loans, with higher amounts up to $50,000 available, indicating they serve both small emergency needs and larger cash requirements. Online application is available, though a physical office location enables in-person consultations and document processing. Customer reviews consistently mention a staff member named Alfred, suggesting personalized service and relationship-based lending. The company emphasizes security with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online transactions. Operating hours are Monday-Friday 9am-7pm and Saturday 10am-5pm, providing accessibility during business hours. Customer feedback indicates competitive rate positioning relative to regional finance alternatives, though reviews suggest the company could improve physical signage, payment plan options, and digital tools. The business model relies on accessible underwriting standards and rapid processing as differentiating factors in a competitive emergency lending market.
address: 3002 Capitol Ave unit B, Sacramento, CA 95816

company_info.headquarters: 3002 Capitol Ave unit B, Sacramento, CA 95816

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Approves borrowers with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and poor credit histories
Loan range of $100-$50,000 accommodates both emergency and larger cash needs
Allows borrowers to keep their vehicle while using car title as collateral
Online application process available alongside in-person office consultation
256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for online transactions
Personalized service with patient staff (Alfred mentioned across multiple reviews)
cons: Car title loans carry inherent risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed
External signage lacks clarity, making location difficult for first-time visitors
Limited payment plan options according to customer feedback
No text payment reminders or mobile app for account management
Saturday-only weekend hours (closed Sundays) may not accommodate all customer schedules
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit or bankruptcy history needing emergency cash
Vehicle owners who can use their car title as collateral and want same-day funding
Consumers seeking faster approval than traditional lenders but who own a vehicle
People comparing regional finance personal loans looking for competitive rates
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners with poor credit who need emergency cash within hours and can accept the risk of collateralized lending against their car title. The main caveat is that missed payments can result in vehicle repossession—this is a high-risk product that should only be considered when other emergency lending options are unavailable or unattainable.
services: Same-day funding for applications submitted by noon
Loan servicing with ability to repay and retrieve vehicle title
Secure online application with 256-bit SSL encryption
